rulings.Case Title: NANCY MARIE SCOTT et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JULY 3, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO ESTABLISH A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. AY'S DECLARATION LACKS SUFFICIENT FACTS FROM WHICH ONE COULD DISCERN THE BASIS FOR HIS OPINION IN PARAGRAPHS SEVEN AND EIGHT. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: NANCY MARIE SCOTT et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al

rulings.Case Title: DENISE GONZALES VS. ARNOLD LAUB et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JULY 3, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANTS ARNOLD LAUB AND STEVEN FABBRO'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, ANSWER WITHIN TEN DAYS. CLAIM IS NOT BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS PER PARAGRAPH 17. ATTORNEYS OWE CLIENTS A FIDUCIARY DUTY. FRAUD IS PLED WITH PARTICULARITY, PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED TORT CLAIMS SEPARATE AND A PART FROM CONSPIRACY. AS A CONSEQUENCE, PLAINTIFF'S CONSPIRACY CLAIMS ARE PROPER AND THE COURT, SUA SPONTE, STRIKES THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUBSTITUTES THE FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM HENRY WHITFIELD VS. AIDA S. O'NEAL et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JULY 3, 2007, LINE 9. DEFENDANT AIDA O'NEAL'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SET FORTH FACTS THAT ESTABLISH A NOVATION AS CONTRASTED WITH A MODIFICATION AND ALSO HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE IMPOSSIBILITY. DEFENDANT ONLY RAISED THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IN REPLY, WHICH IS CONTRARY TO C.C.P. SECTION 437C. BY ALLOWING PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR LACK OF STANDING IS MOOT AND THIS PART OF THE RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT SUBSEQUENTLY CHALLENGING STANDING. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM HENRY WHITFIELD VS. AIDA S. O'NEAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Dfor Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JULY 3, 2007, LINE 9. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM WHITFIELD'S Motion for Leave To File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED ON OR BEFORE JULY 5, 2007, AND THAT IT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT RAISING THE ISSUE OF STANDING. =(302/PJM/KD)
